---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability Font Studio doesn't have yet
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!-- What can't you do today, or what's awkward to do today? Be specific. -->

## What would help

<!-- The change you'd like to see. If you have a rough design or shape in
     mind, sketch it. Specific is better than abstract. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem. Often the answer is "use feature
     X" or "there's a workaround via Y" — listing what you've already tried
     helps the maintainer respond. -->

## How important is it?

<!-- "Nice to have" / "would use weekly" / "blocking work I want to do" — be
     honest. Smaller-than-it-sounds is fine. -->
